title: Amalia majalis
uses: Amalia majalis, also known as the evening primrose, has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits. Its leaves and flowers are a rich source of antioxidants and essential fatty acids, which may help to reduce inflammation and improve skin health. The plant has been used to treat various conditions, including digestive issues and skin conditions such as eczema. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is also used to treat menstrual issues and to support the immune system. However, more research is needed to confirm the effectiveness of Amalia majalis for medicinal uses.

However, further studies are needed to confirm the full range of its health benefits.
